sections.paragraph:
μοσχοποιέω (μόσχος, ποιέω) 1 aor. ἐμοσχοποίησα (only in Christian wr., e.g. Just.; εἰδωλοποιέω Pla.+) manufacture a calf of the golden calf Ac 7:41 (for ἐποίησε μόσχον Ex 32:4).—M-M. TW. Sv.

aor. aor. = aorist

  1. wr. = writers, writings

e.g. e.g. = exempli gratia (for example)

Just Just , II a.d.—List 5

Pla Pla , V–IV b.c.; s. also Ps.-Plato—List 5

M-M M-M = JMoulton/GMilligan, Vocabulary of Greek Testament—Lists 4, 6

TW TW = Theologisches Wörterbuch zum NT; tr. GBromiley, Theological Dictionary of the NT—List 6

Sv Sv (at the end of entries)=HSieben, Voces—List 6

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 660
